description_long: This is a rectangular, dark-colored glass bottle with a black screw cap and prominent white labeling on all sides. The front label features the iconic Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey branding in ornate white script, surrounded by decorative borders. The bottle has a broad, flat front and back, with slightly rounded shoulders and a short neck. The sides display additional product information and branding, with one side showing a list of ingredients and the other side featuring more stylized text. The bottle's surface appears glossy and smooth, with no visible damage or deformation. The overall design is classic and easily recognizable, often associated with whiskey bottles.
description: A rectangular, dark glass Jack Daniel's whiskey bottle with a black screw cap and ornate white labeling on all sides. The surface is glossy and smooth, with prominent branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey label in white on a black background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a block of white text with product and ingredient information.
description_view_2: Rear view with additional branding and stylized text in white on black.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring more white text and branding details.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey' in ornate white script on black; sides and back have additional white text and branding details in various fonts and sizes.
